creative_premise: The Unreliable Observatory is a self-contained instrument that reports weather from impossible places.

local_result.scope: contract-equivalent local fixture due runtime network egress failure; committed source was separately fetched and inspected through GitHub

observed: Committed source contains a mobile viewport declaration, safe-area-aware layout, responsive breakpoint, reduced-motion rule, 44px controls, keyboard scan, live regions, opt-in Web Audio, and no external runtime dependency.
The experience contains seven impossible-place weather reports and exposes a small runtime identity object for testing.
The source does not contain Mirror Cartographer explanatory language, commerce controls, account state, or private user material.
inferred: The artifact has a distinct literary-instrument identity rather than a research portal, dashboard, or product funnel.
The single-file dependency-free architecture is suitable for static hosting once a public route is configured.
unresolved: No public hosting URL was observed.
No real-device mobile screenshot or interaction recording was captured.
The committed test file was not executed directly from a fresh checkout because the runtime could not resolve github.com.
privacy_boundary: Public creative source and operational evidence only; no private chat, health material, credentials, account identifiers, or personal data.
